plan.title: No audio on iPhone (noise + meditation); Chrome OK

narratives.Description: On iPhone, colored noise and meditation sounds produce no audible output. Chrome desktop works.
narratives.Overview: iOS Safari keeps AudioContext suspended unless create+resume (and preferably a silent buffer kick) run synchronously inside the user-gesture stack. NoiseEngine.init currently awaits audioWorklet.addModule before any resume, which breaks the gesture chain on iOS so both noise and meditation stay silent.
narratives.Requirements:
FR-1: Starting colored noise on iPhone produces audible output after Play.
FR-2: Meditation sounds play audibly when previewed/scheduled after unlock.
FR-3: Desktop Chrome behavior unchanged.
FR-4: Document any remaining iOS caveats (silent switch) in PR notes.
NFR-1: Unit tests for unlock/create helpers.
narratives.LockedDecisions: Root cause hypothesis: await addModule before resume() loses the iOS user-gesture unlock. Fix: create AudioContext (webkit fallback) + sync unlockAudioContext (resume + silent buffer) before any await; re-unlock after worklet load; keep primeAudioOutput for cold-graph priming.

references.title: Issue #83: No audio on iPhone (noise + meditation); Chrome OK
